title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Designed and developed a comprehensive management system using React, Node.js, Express.js, and PostgreSQL. Implemented client-side and server-side validation reducing data entry errors by 35%. Followed Agile practices in a distributed remote team, meeting all sprint deadlines.

title: Software Developer
description: Led the development of a comprehensive academic management platform with React.js and Node.js/Express.js. Optimized PostgreSQL queries improving performance by 40% through indexing strategies and query analysis. Automated administrative workflows using Python and Node.js, reducing manual workload by 60%. Implemented Docker to standardize development environments and CI/CD pipelines for consistent deployments. Developed advanced search modules, recycle bin system, PDF report generation, and customizable user preferences.
